panel.title: Panel
panel.description: Endpoints the control plane and agents advertise publicly.
panel.httpPublicUrlDescription: Public-facing URL for this control plane
panel.passwordMinLengthDescription: Operators creating or rotating passwords must meet this floor (8–128). Existing accounts are not invalidated.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: How the dashboard looks and feels for your account.

users.title: User Management
users.description: Create, edit, and manage user accounts for this panel.
users.accountsDescription: Go to the user list to add admins, rotate passwords, or revoke access.

system.title: System
system.description: Destructive operations on the control plane itself.
system.restartDescription: Gracefully restart the control-plane process. Active WebSocket and gRPC connections will briefly drop.

systemInfo.title: System info
systemInfo.description: Bootstrap settings — locked by environment or config file.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.description: How long the panel keeps timeseries and history records before pruning.

ts_raw_seconds.label: Raw Metrics
ts_raw_seconds.description: Server load and DC health raw data points

retention.unsavedNotice: Unsaved changes · retention windows will apply on next prune cycle.

http.title: Public access
http.desc: Public URLs the panel advertises to agents and clients.

agents.title: Agents
agents.desc: Heartbeat thresholds and outbound supervisor backoff.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.desc: Password policy, session timeouts, TOTP windows.

registryField.jsonNotice: Edit via the dedicated section below
registryField.configManagedHint: Managed via config.toml / environment, or the `panvex-control-plane settings` CLI.

restartBanner.suffix: a panel restart to take effect:

geoip.title: GeoIP
geoip.description: Country / city / ASN enrichment for the IP history table.

webhooks.title: Webhook Endpoints
webhooks.description: HMAC-signed outbound delivery for audit + alert events. Receivers are matched by event_filter and retried with exponential backoff.
webhooks.emptyHint: Add one to start fanning out audit + alert events to Slack, PagerDuty, or your own receiver.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete webhook endpoint?
deleteConfirm.body: "{{name}}" will stop receiving events immediately. Pending outbox rows for this endpoint will also be removed (CASCADE).

form.intro: Outbound HTTP receiver for audit + alert events. Bodies are HMAC-SHA256 signed with the endpoint secret; receivers verify via the <1>X-Panvex-Signature</1> header.
form.secretDescription: HMAC key used to sign delivery bodies. Treated as a credential — not returned by the API after save.
form.filterDescription: Comma-separated event actions or prefixes (e.g. `audit.*,alert.fired`). Empty = match all.
form.enabledHint: Disabled endpoints stop receiving new events; queued rows drain only when re-enabled.
form.allowPrivateHint: Bypasses SSRF preflight. Only enable for receivers on operator-owned private networks.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 128 characters or fewer.
validation.urlScheme: URL must start with http:// or https://.
validation.secretTooLong: Secret must be 1024 characters or fewer.
